title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Soldiers (Litigation) Act, 1925. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.] (3) It shall come into force on the first day of April, 1925.
footnote: 1. Subs. by A.O. 1950 for sub-section (2). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 62 of 1956, s. 2 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-11-1956).
